'''Dandrian''' in the [[Dandrian system/Legends|Dandrian system]] was called the "crossroads of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]". It had a single [[Star/Legends|sun]] and was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by the [[Dandrian Ring/Legends|Dandrian's Ring]] of [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]], the remnants of a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] that struck the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] during formation. It had a thick [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]], flat marshes, and tropical grass, but no [[Tree/Legends|trees]]. It was located between [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] and [[Yavin Prime/Legends|Yavin]], and between [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]] and [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]].<ref name="Dandrian's Ring adventure">{{ChallengeCite|49|Dandrian's Ring (adventure)}}</ref> It was inhabited by indigenous [[Bonecrusher (creature)|bonecrushers]] as well as [[Human/Legends|Humans]] and [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorreans]].
